description: Conditionally derive the running-left row by framewise-horizontal-mirroring the approved running-right strip (preserving frame order), then mark the running-left job complete in the run's imagegen job manifest with a recorded mirror decision.
rules: requires running-right job complete and running-left configured for conditional mirroring (mirror_policy.may_derive_from == running-right)
DECISION_NOTE must explain why mirroring is acceptable; FORCE=1 replaces an existing running-left.png; a JSON result is captured to record_store/derive-result.json
usage: Set RUN_DIR (a prepared run dir with a complete running-right) and DECISION_NOTE; optionally FORCE=1. Output: derive-result.json (and run-dir decoded/running-left.png).
limitation: Operates on an existing run folder; not a generator. Refuses to run without confirmation/decision note, or if running-right is not complete or running-left is not mirror-eligible. Requires Pillow (PIL).

vars.DECISION_NOTE: Symmetric mascot; mirroring preserves identity and props.
